Schedule

Class
Schedule

Beginner classes in McKinney and Frisco. Contact us for all other program schedules.

BeginnerClasses

Perfect for ages 3+. No experience needed. Free trial class available.

McKinney

4260 Eldorado Parkway, McKinney, TX 75070

Monday 4:00 PM
Beginners (Ages 3-5) 45 min
Monday 5:00 PM
Beginners (Ages 6-8) 60 min
Wednesday 4:00 PM
Beginners (Ages 3-5) 45 min
Saturday 9:00 AM
Beginners (All Ages) 60 min

Pricing

Pricing varies by program and commitment level. Contact Coach Ella for current rates and family discounts.

  • Free trial class for new students
  • Family discounts available
  • No long-term contracts required
